name: Water Surface
summary: A Three.js-inspired Cesium polygon water shader with procedural normal distortion, Fresnel reflection, refractive color blending, and a yunzhou-onemap-style flow type.
useCases: River and lake surfaces with flowing wave motion
Water conservancy demos that need a reusable animated water polygon

polygon.description: WGS84 polygon positions with longitude and latitude.

type.description: Water material style. flow adds a stronger directional river-current style inspired by yunzhou-onemap WaterPrimitive.

color.description: CSS color used by the water shader.

distortionScale.description: Normal-distortion scale inspired by Three.js Water distortionScale.

refractionStrength.description: Strength of refractive underwater color blending.

fresnelPower.description: Power curve used by the Fresnel reflection term.

minimal.code:
import { createWaterSurfaceEffect } from '@ztgkzhaohao/geo-effect-kit'

const water = createWaterSurfaceEffect(viewer, {
  polygon: [
    { longitude: 113.53286993642162, latitude: 40.09427040664276, height: 1100.5107316527904 },
    { longitude: 113.53289090505918, latitude: 40.094102733213965, height: 1100.115053866143 },
    { longitude: 113.53320229759383, latitude: 40.09427348256092, height: 1103.1671287483625 },
    { longitude: 113.53286993642162, latitude: 40.09427040664276, height: 1100.5107316527904 },
  ],
  type: 'flow',
  color: '#00777f',
  waveStrength: 0.32,
  reflectionStrength: 0.3,
  distortionScale: 3.7,
  reflectivity: 0.3,
  refractionStrength: 0.34,
  fresnelPower: 3.2,
  flowDirection: 186,
})

water.flyTo()
water.destroy()

notes: Pass an existing Cesium Viewer; the SDK does not create or own the viewer.
Coordinates are WGS84 longitude/latitude and are converted with Cartesian3.fromDegrees.

The water polygon uses GeoWaterSurfaceMaterial with czm_frameNumber animation, procedural normal distortion, Fresnel reflection, refractive color blending, and a flow branch inspired by yunzhou-onemap WaterPrimitive.
Call destroy() during page cleanup to remove the data source and render loop.
